intent: Single-screen BU (Berufsunfaehigkeit) application: occupation, income, desired monthly pension capped against gross income, plus a cascade of health and lifestyle questions whose details fields become Required only on Yes.
notes: Tier-2 insurance baseline (vorvertragliche Anzeigepflicht): exercises three independent conditional-requiredness branches (Vorerkrankungen->details, Risiko-Hobbys->details, plus the cross-field cap on BU-Rente against Jahresbrutto). One INFORMATIVE_LABEL surfaces the Wartezeit-Hinweis without inventing a concrete period (the rubric forbids fabricating regulatory specifics) and one RESULT_DISPLAY models the vorlaeufige Praemienprognose. The truthful-statement RADIO_OPTION is the audit gate the harness must reflect in any negative path that submits without acknowledgement.
